differential_diagnoses: Drug-induced liver injury or supplement-related cardiotoxicity
Post-acute sequelae of SARS-CoV-2 (PASC) with autonomic dysfunction
next_steps: Admit to telemetry unit for continuous cardiac monitoring
Perform transthoracic echocardiogram to assess for wall motion abnormalities, valve function, and structural heart disease
Obtain Lyme disease serology (ELISA followed by Western blot)
Perform cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (CMR) to evaluate for myocardial inflammation or fibrosis
Review all herbal supplements and medications for potential cardiotoxic or hepatotoxic effects
Consider Holter monitoring if rhythm disturbances persist
Maintain high index of suspicion for MIS-A and consider specialist infectious disease and cardiology consultation
